meaning: n.挫折,失败,完全成熟的人
examples: Murakami was a late bloomer, writing his first work at age 29.
He said: "My father always said to me I would be a late bloomer."
An Estonian breakfast – curd cheese on a wheat bloomer – known locally as ‘cheese on toast’.
